rationale: Both papers are in the same consumer goal-pursuit domain and share key constructs (especially goal commitment/motivation): the citing paper’s core mechanism is commitment-driven progress perception, while the cited paper provides evidence on commitment dynamics and misprediction across subgoal sequences. Given this conceptual overlap and the absence of in-text citation context (only DOI-level match metadata), this is not safely an obvious mention-only citation and should proceed to full relation judgment.
